name: data.redis
description: Redis event-store adapter for the provider-agnostic runx data operation envelope.

data_source_binding.description: Non-secret data-source binding injected by data.source.

redis_url.description: Redis URL for direct harness use. Prefer data_source_binding.endpoint.

key_prefix.description: Redis key prefix for direct harness use. Redis Cluster bindings must include one safe hash tag, such as runx:{tenant-operator}. Prefer data_source_binding.key_prefix.

resource.description: Declared event resource or stream family.

aggregate_id.description: Stream or partition key. Omit for list_stream_heads.

expected_version.description: Required current stream version for append_event.

event.description: Domain event or transition packet for append_event.

after_version.description: Return ascending read_events strictly after this version; omit for the latest tail.

event_types.description: Optional array of exact latest event types for list_stream_heads.
